diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class, Context, HonoRequest type, client InferRequestType/InferResponseType types
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that re-exports everything for users
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports Hono from ./hono and all type interfaces from types/context/request/client modules
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Variables, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, RouterRoute
+- Internal names noticed: Next, Input, BlankEnv, Schema, MergePath, ToSchema, Endpoint, TypedResponse, ValidationTargets, ParamKeys, ParamKeyToRecord, IntersectNonAnyTypes, FetchEventLike, ExecutionContext, BlankSchema, BlankInput, HonoBase
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Massive type definition file defining interfaces, handlers, schemas, and typed responses
+- Copy-safe detail: Defines all TypeScript types for handlers, routes, validation, path parameters, schemas, and typed response formats
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Concrete Hono class that extends HonoBase and sets up default router
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, extends HonoBase, configures SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallbacks
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: Base routing methods, get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use, request, fetch
+- Internal names noticed: notFoundHandler, errorHandler, HonoOptions, GetPath, MountOptionHandler, MountReplaceRequest, MountOptions, HonoBase
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Core routing and dispatch logic, defines all HTTP method handlers and middleware support
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines, implements router registration, error handling, middleware composition, mounting, base path handling, request dispatching
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, env, req, res, event, executionCtx, header, status, set, get, var, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound
+- Internal names noticed: ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer, Data, GET_MATCH_RESULT, ResponseOrInit, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, HTMLRespond, JSONRespond, JSONRespondReturn
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request context holder with response rendering helpers and variable storage
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines, manages response state, variables, headers, provides text/json/html rendering and redirects
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, raw, path, param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, ValidationTargets, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper with path parameters, query params, headers, and body parsing utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines, caches body reads, extracts path/query params, provides multiple body parsing formats
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Single symbol export used as key for accessing match result
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, exports unique symbol for internal matching result access
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function
+- Internal names noticed: BodyData, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, ParseBodyOptions, HandleParsingAllValues, HandleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses form data and URL-encoded bodies with all and dot notation options
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines, handles multipart/form-data, application/x-www-form-urlencoded, supports array values and nested dot notation
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, dispatch
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English schema: Middleware composition using Koa-style dispatch pattern
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, implements middleware chaining with error and not-found handling
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class, getResponse
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Exception for controlled HTTP error responses with status and message
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, extends Error, wraps response object or creates new Response with status
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse
+- Internal names noticed: BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, Client, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, ResponseFormat
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client builder with path-based API and type inference for requests
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, exports hc utility and response parsing functions
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class
+- Internal names noticed: Cookie, UnionToIntersection, BuildSearchParamsFn, deepMerge, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./
